f_dash1_desc: Visible in the dashboard for all plans. Instant SMS alert PRO
f_dash2_desc: Reply in 1 click — answer added to FAQ automatically.
f_dash3_desc: Conversations, appointments, languages, traffic sources — at a glance. PRO
f_db_date: Monday 12 May · 142 customers served this month
f_db_faq_hint: Reply to enrich your FAQ automatically
f_db_sub: Active conversations, pending appointments, unanswered questions — everything you need to manage your business remotely.
f_db_tip_text: Connect Google Calendar for automatic appointments.
f_feat1_desc: Detects and replies in the customer's language instantly. French, German, Italian, Spanish, English, Portuguese, Dutch, Polish.
f_feat2_desc: The client says "Tuesday around 2pm", the AI handles the booking: Google Calendar, external link, manual or disabled.
f_feat3_desc: The AI detects urgent requests 🔴 and flags them in your dashboard — all plans. Instant SMS alert PRO
f_feat4_desc: When it doesn't know, it asks you and remembers the answer. The more it works, the smarter it gets.
f_feat5_desc: Weekly or daily summaries with trends, detected opportunities and missing FAQ.
f_feat6_desc: Storefront, flyers, Instagram bio, business card — one scan and your customer talks to your AI.
f_final_sub: 14 days free, full Pro access. Cancel anytime.
f_hero_sub: A complete AI assistant that speaks 8 languages, manages your appointments and learns from every conversation.
f_learn_desc: When a customer asks a question the AI doesn't know yet, it doesn't guess — it alerts you and integrates your answer for next time.
f_learn_li1: Question received in any language → auto-translated for you
f_learn_li2: You reply → your answer is auto-translated into the customer's language
f_learn_li3: Answer added to FAQ — AI replies automatically next time
f_learn_li4: Knowledge base that grows with your business
f_learn_title: The AI that never gets stuck
f_ml_desc: A German customer lands on your page, the AI auto-detects the language and replies in German. No setup, no delay.
f_ml_li1: Automatic detection from the first message
f_ml_li4: Ideal for border areas and tourist zones
f_ml_title: Your customers talk, the AI replies — in their language
f_mock_ml_a1: Yes, we accept holiday vouchers as well as credit cards and cash. 💳
f_mock_ml_a2: Children's cut from age 3, €18. No separate appointment needed. 👧
f_mock_ml_a3: Yes, free parking at Market Square, 2 min walk. 🅿️
f_mock_rdv_a1: Of course! Please fill in this form 👇
f_mock_rdv_q1: I would like to book a haircut appointment
f_modal_add_faq_desc: The AI will automatically answer this question for all future customers
f_modal_email_note: ✉️ The reply will be sent by email to the customer
f_modal_notify_desc: Send your reply by email to the customer (if address available)
f_modal_question: Do you have a water fountain?
f_onboard_sub: No developer needed, no technical configuration. You guide, the AI follows.
f_pricing_sub: 14-day free Pro trial included. All features, no commitment.
f_qr_analytics_note: Data available in your Analytics dashboard
f_qr_desc: Each business gets a unique link and a print-ready QR code. Display it in your window, share it on Instagram, add it to Google.
f_qr_li2: QR code downloadable as PNG or PDF
f_qr_li3: Automatic source detection (QR, Instagram, website, Google)
f_qr_li4: Analytics by source in your dashboard
f_qr_ready_desc: Download as PNG or PDF — laminate and display in your window, on tables or at the counter.
f_qr_sources_title: Where do your customers come from?
f_qr_title: One link, one QR code — wherever your customers are
f_rdv_desc: As soon as the customer expresses a desire to book, the AI automatically opens a form in the chat. No app to download, no complex navigation.
f_rdv_form_footer: The salon will confirm by email or SMS
f_rdv_li1: Google Calendar connected → request forwarded, you confirm by email or SMS
f_rdv_li2: Planity, Doctolib, TheFork → AI sends the booking link directly
f_rdv_li3: Manual mode → you handle confirmations yourself
f_rdv_li4: Appointment automatically added to Calendar if connected
f_rdv_title:
A smart form,
not a complicated calendar
f_section_sub: LocalReply understands context, anticipates needs and replies like a qualified team member — not a robot.
f_step1_desc: Choose your business type. Ready-made FAQ templates by industry (salon, restaurant, coach…).
f_step2_desc: Services, prices, hours, address. The AI learns them and replies on your behalf right away.
f_step3_desc: Google Calendar in 1 click for automatic appointments. Or choose an external link (Planity…).
f_step4_desc: QR code in your window, link in your Instagram bio. Your customers can reach you tonight.
